title: cistanthe humilis
intro: Cistanthe humilis, also known as Chickenshaw, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Montiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cistanthe humilis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in tinctures and salves, making it a versatile remedy in herbal medicine.
